# agent-utilities

> A batteries-included harness for building Pydantic-AI agents that ship with a
> knowledge graph, orchestration, memory, and tools. The default knowledge graph
> runs in-process with zero external service dependencies. Consume it as a Python
> library, as an MCP server (`graph-os`), or via a REST gateway. The heavy graph
> compute lives in a separate Rust engine (`epistemic-graph`), reached
> out-of-process over a socket — no Rust needed to start. At scale, every plane
> is opt-in horizontally scalable: shared Postgres state, tenant-sharded
> engines, Kafka-backed ingest and dispatch worker fleets, pre-forked gateway
> workers, server-minted JWT identity, Prometheus metrics, and an
> ActionPolicy-gated fleet autonomy control plane.

## Start here (read first)

- [Start Here — what it is & how to use it](docs/start-here.md): the one-page overview — pillars, the 3 consumption models, zero-infra KG.
- [Capabilities](docs/capabilities.md): concrete list of what an agent can do, with copy-paste library + MCP snippets.
- [Consumption Models](docs/guides/consumption-models.md): library vs MCP stdio vs MCP HTTP vs REST gateway — when to use each.

## Deploy

- [Deployment Configurations](docs/guides/deployment-configurations.md): the flagship guide — every deployment shape from zero-infra laptop to sharded, queue-driven, policy-governed fleet.
- [Self-Setup (config-complete)](docs/guides/self-setup.md): the one runbook to deploy agent-utilities (or for Claude to set itself up) — profile → generate full config (setup-config, all ~261 options) → secrets → databases → launch → verify (config doctor). Guided by the agent-utilities-deployment skill.
- [Day-0 Deployment](docs/guides/day0.md): install deps → run graph-os + multiplexer → deploy the *-mcp fleet → wire integrations.
- [Recipe: Tiny (all-local, zero-infra)](docs/recipes/tiny.md)
- [Recipe: Single-node prod](docs/recipes/single-node-prod.md)
- [Recipe: Enterprise (swarm)](docs/recipes/enterprise.md)
- [Recipe: Stardog + pg-age databases](docs/recipes/databases.md): push the ontology to Stardog (or local /api/sparql), backfill relationships into Apache AGE, from .env/OpenBao.
- [Installation](docs/guides/installation.md) · [Configuration](docs/guides/configuration.md)

## Scale-out & autonomy (architecture deep dives)

- [State Externalization](docs/architecture/state_externalization.md): STATE_DB_URI shared Postgres state, SKIP LOCKED queue claims, advisory-lock daemon leadership, fleet pagination (OS-5.16-5.18, KG-2.54, ORCH-1.44).
- [Engine Sharding](docs/architecture/engine_sharding.md): tenant-partitioned epistemic-graph shards behind client-side HRW routing + shard topology visibility (KG-2.58, OS-5.28).
- [Event Backbone](docs/architecture/event_backbone_architecture.md): Kafka event backbone + ingest task-queue scale-out — fail-loud TASK_QUEUE_BACKEND, keyed kg_tasks partitions, kg-ingest consumer group (KG-2.55-2.57).
- [Agent Dispatch](docs/architecture/agent_dispatch.md): queue-driven agent dispatch — session-keyed agent_turns queue + stateless agent-dispatch-worker fleet (ORCH-1.45).
- [Fleet Autonomy](docs/architecture/fleet_autonomy.md): fleet event ingress, ActionPolicy decision point, desired-state reconciler, remediation playbooks, health-gated deploy watch, reactive autoscaler (OS-5.15, OS-5.24-5.27, OS-5.29).
- [Gateway Scaling](docs/architecture/gateway_scaling.md): GATEWAY_WORKERS pre-fork, per-tenant rate limiting, engine circuit breaker, Prometheus /metrics (OS-5.23).
- [Autonomous Evolution](docs/guides/autonomous-evolution.md): the governed self-evolution chain — propose-only loops, governance validator, regression gate, policy-gated branch publication (AHE-3.18-3.21).
- [Metrics Reference](docs/reference/metrics.md): catalog of every agent_utilities_* Prometheus series.

- [Sharding walkthrough](docs/examples/sharding-walkthrough.md) · [Queue-dispatch walkthrough](docs/examples/queue-dispatch-walkthrough.md) · [Evolution publication](docs/examples/evolution-publication.md)
- [Observability](docs/examples/observability.md) · [Identity & JWT](docs/examples/identity-jwt.md) · [MCP consumption](docs/examples/mcp-consumption.md)

- [Ecosystem map](docs/ecosystem.md): how agent-utilities anchors epistemic-graph, the UIs, the *-mcp connector fleet, and the enterprise services.

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): conventions, architecture rules, working discipline, configuration discipline, the concept registry.
